---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: sametkaya
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Load image '...'
4. See error

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / logs**
If applicable, add screenshots and paste any error message or console/log output.

**Input data**
- Image type: [ raw grayscale / binary skeleton ]
- Format: [ TIFF / PNG / BMP / JPEG ]
- Size: [ e.g. 512x512 ]

**Detection method**
- [ ] Traditional Image Processing (TIP)
- [ ] Deep Learning (DL)

**Environment (please complete the following):**
- VAP2D version / Docker tag: [ e.g. v2.3, sametkaya/vap2d:v2.3 ]
- Installation method: [ Docker / local (pip) ]
- OS: [ e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13 ]
- Python version: [ e.g. 3.10 ]
- GPU / CUDA (if using DL): [ e.g. RTX 3080, CUDA 11.8 / CPU only ]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
